title: Polynomial Workshop

tests.name: linear polynomial prints in descending order
cubic with zero coefficient and unit terms omits 1x
constants and trailing zeros render as a single value
evaluate x^2 + 1 at positive and negative integers

milestones.title: Milestone 3: Combine with operator+ and operator*

tests.name: (x - 1) and (x + 1) sum to 2x and multiply to x^2 - 1
multiply by a constant and add a constant
opposite polynomials sum to zero and collapse

milestones.title: Milestone 4: Derivatives and a sorted catalog

tests.name: three derivatives of a cubic eventually reach a constant
LIST sorts by ascending degree and counts non-constants

milestones.title: Milestone 5: Value tables on dynamic memory

tests.name: table of x^2 + 1 with integer step
table of 2x with a fractional step
single-point table when x0 equals x1
